'''Vornez''' was a small village on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] that was established after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] fell. It was located near the [[Central Clinic]]<ref name="TLCotJ">''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]'' {{1stm}}
